name: Befar Group Co.,Ltd
summary: Befar Group Co.,Ltd primarily produces and sells caustic soda and propylene oxide in China. The company offers 1,2-dichloropropane, tetrachloroethylene, pentafluoroethane, vinyl chloride, 3-chloropropene, hydrogen peroxide, polymer polyol, sodium hypochlorite, sodium sucfate, sulfate decahydrate, synthetic and chemical reagent hydrochloric acid, sodium hydroxide, sodium hydroxid caustic soda pearls and flakes, trichloroethylene, sodium hypochlorite, and dichloropropane. It also provides food additive hydrochloric acid and sodium hydroxide in liquid and solid forms; elastomer, adhesives, sealants, and coatings; and slow and high resilience, and rigid foam polyether polyol. In addition, the company supplies oil additives. Befar Group Co.,Ltd also exports its products to 100 countries and regions worldwide. The company was founded in 1968 and is based in Binzhou, China.
